title: Mark Frank
compiled_truth: Mark Frank is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-29), Mark Frank sent 3 and received 63 emails, totalling 66 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rod Hayslett](people/rod-hayslett) (2), [James Saunders](people/james-saunders) (2), [Melissa Becker](people/melissa-becker) (2), [David Mcellin](people/david-mcellin) (2), [Ozlem Mahmood](people/ozlem-mahmood) (2).
